provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Cruelty to Animals Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires—
"animal" means any horse, mare, gelding, bull, cow, ox, heifer, steer, calf, mule, ass, sheep, lamb, hog, pig, sow, goat, ostrich, dog, cat, or any other domestic animal, fowl or bird and includes any wild animal in a state of captivity;
"owner" , in addition to its ordinary meaning, includes any person having the charge, custody or control of any animal.

provisions.title: Offences relating to cruelty to animals

definitions.definition: any horse, mare, gelding, bull, cow, ox, heifer, steer, calf, mule, ass, sheep, lamb, hog, pig, sow, goat, ostrich, dog, cat, or any other domestic animal, fowl or bird and includes any wild animal in a state of captivity
